# SOURCE: NOW VSL Method 2020 (NOWVSL)

> **Person:** Jon Benson
> **Source ID:** NOWVSL

> **Files:** 128
> **Size:** ~1.7MB
> **Modules:** 8 + Q&A sessions

---

## OVERVIEW

The NOW VSL Method 2020 is Jon Benson's updated and expanded version of the 3X VSL Formula. It covers the complete VSL creation process from USP development through neuro-marketing techniques and webinar integration. The course spans 8 modules with Q&A sessions, representing Jon's most comprehensive VSL methodology at the time of recording.

---

## SECTIONS

| # | Section | Focus |
|---|---------|-------|
| 1 | VSL Foundations & USP Factory | Core principles, USP creation system |
| 2 | The 1-2-3 Formula Deep Dive | Problem-Agitation-Solution framework |
| 3 | Pattern Interrupts & Attention Engineering | Maintaining viewer attention |
| 4 | Storytelling (Nightmare + Dream Formulas) | Emotional arc construction |
| 5 | Grand Offer Construction (6-Part) | Stack, anchor, discount, bonuses, guarantee, urgency |
| 6 | Closing & Future Pacing | NLP-based close sequences, 3-timeframe future pacing |
| 7 | Neuro-Marketing & Subliminal Persuasion | Embedded commands, subliminal techniques |
| 8 | 3X Webinar Formula & Conspiracy Cycle | Multi-webinar sequences, insider psychology |
| Q&A | Q&A Sessions | Implementation guidance |

## KEY FRAMEWORKS

| Framework | Description | Layer |
|-----------|-------------|-------|
| 5-Step VSL Formula | Hook - Story - Mechanism - Proof - Offer+Urgency (expanded from 3XVSL) | L4 |
| 1-2-3 Formula | Problem-Agitation-Solution deep dive with substeps | L4 |
| USP Factory | 5-step system for creating unique selling propositions | L4 |
| Snap Suggestion | Subliminal pattern interrupt that resets attention | L4 |
| Nightmare Story Formula | Descending emotional arc: normal → trigger → spiral → bottom → lamp | L4 |
| Dream Story Formula | Ascending mirror: bottom → discovery → application → transformation → new life | L4 |
| Grand Offer 6-Part | Stack → Price Anchor → Discount → Bonuses → Guarantee → Urgency | L4 |
| 3X Webinar Formula | Teaching + Offer + Retargeting webinars in 7-day sequence | L4 |
| Conspiracy Cycle | Creates sense of privileged insider information | L2 |
| Tip Formula | Genuine useful tip mid-VSL increases trust, reduces resistance | L4 |

---

## KEY HEURISTICS

| Heuristic | Value | Domain |
|-----------|-------|--------|
| Future pacing timeframes | 7 days, 30 days, 1 year — each with specific visualization | nlp-selling |
| Pattern interrupt frequency | Every 2-3 minutes (visual or verbal) | pattern-interrupts |
| USP test | "Neighbor test" — if prospect's neighbor can't understand in 10 seconds, it's not a USP | usp-creation |
| Rhetorical questions | Every 90 seconds to keep prospect in active response mode | engagement-psychology |
| Embedded commands | Imperative phrases hidden inside larger sentences | subliminal-persuasion |
| Visual pattern interrupts | Background color, font size, unexpected image changes | pattern-interrupts |
| Implementation assignments | Every module ends with action item — execution over learning | copywriting |
